taziri_nkhaleb.home: The road itself—feels wrong when stationary more than two days
taziri_nkhaleb.faction: Neutral merchant (minor Elunad association via late husband)
taziri_nkhaleb.appearance: Imazuran woman, late 40s, olive skin weathered by road dust, sharp brown eyes that count everything, ochre and grey traveling robes, silver measuring-chain belt, ink-stained hands
taziri_nkhaleb.and_yet: Keeps Isarna shrine in lead wagon, burns expensive incense at every crossroads
taziri_nkhaleb.wants: Profitable predictable routes, respect from both cultures, vengeance on lizard-men
taziri_nkhaleb.does_not_want: Questions about husband's death, choosing factional sides, lizard-men mentioned as allies
taziri_nkhaleb.oddly_also: Collects obscure road songs in journal, refuses water drawn south of the road
taziri_nkhaleb.thinks_with: Coin, probabilities, road-wisdom from Elunad husband
taziri_nkhaleb.family: Late husband Irven (Elunad, killed by lizard-men 8yr ago), son Khalid (24, leads return caravans), daughter Sarit (22, manages Orziben warehouses), son Davin (19, Ilmenor scribe apprentice), brother Azghar (teamster)
taziri_nkhaleb.self_image: Bridge between Gallaecian and Imazuran, keeper of husband's legacy, protector of her caravan family
taziri_nkhaleb.recreation: Singing road songs at crossroads, updating ledgers by candlelight, polishing husband's waystone marker
taziri_nkhaleb.dreams: Davin becomes respected Ilmenor scholar, safe profitable routes forever, finding who killed Irven
anecdotes: Once outbid a hobgoblin warlord for iron nails using only dried figs and honey
Navigated through fey-glamoured woods by singing Isarna hymns until dawn
Refused Covenant-Bound 'special cargo' offer despite massive payment
tragedies: Husband Irven killed in southern swamps 8 years ago (believes lizard-men responsible)
Has hidden map of 'safe paths' Irven drew before death—guards it obsessively
Receives coded letters from Davin hinting at dangerous Ilmenor secrets
taziri_nkhaleb.pc_leverage: Prove lizard-men didn't kill Irven OR find actual killers; protect Davin; share intelligence on humanoid coordination; respect her authority on the road

caravan.route: Caelrun to Tagmira (primary), broader Luric Marches circuit
caravan.current_leg: Caelrun to Tagmira — party traveling with her
caravan.brother_azghar: Teamster, Taziri's brother, manages the wagons day-to-day
caravan.waystone_observance: Will stop at Waystone of Isarna west of Tagmira for offering (bread, silver thread)
caravan.dm_notes: Taziri is the party's most reliable civilian connection across the Luric Marches. She knows both Caelrun and Tagmira well and can brief the party on surface-level politics of either. She has no knowledge of the undead alliance. Her Isarna observance at the waystone is a natural scene transition into Tagmira.

mother_yaleth.home: Nemetra—has never left, refuses to, sees leaving as betrayal of the sick and dying who need her
mother_yaleth.faction: Herb-wives (unofficial leader), allied with House Yebrin
mother_yaleth.appearance: Late 60s, weathered face with deep lines, sharp grey eyes that miss nothing, faded green shawl, earth-stained hands, walks with carved hazelwood staff, wears dried herb bundles at belt
mother_yaleth.wants: Truth about northern woods threat, village to take danger seriously, protect the younger herb-wives
mother_yaleth.does_not_want: Militia interference, fools dismissing her warnings, goblins harmed before she learns what they know
mother_yaleth.oddly_also: Heavy smoker (pipe, strong tobacco) despite it damaging her lungs—considered unfeminine, she doesn't care
mother_yaleth.thinks_with: Observation, herb-lore passed down generations, pattern recognition from decades of births and deaths
mother_yaleth.family: House Yebrin (distant cousin), 6 herb-wives under her guidance, no living children
mother_yaleth.self_image: Proud of her humility, quietly smug about being right when others are wrong
mother_yaleth.recreation: Smoking her pipe on the compound steps at dusk, watching village life
mother_yaleth.dreams: Establish Nemetra as tobacco exporter, prove herb-wives' wisdom to the fools, die respected
anecdotes: Delivered Captain Durvin himself during a winter storm—he was blue when he came out, she breathed life back into him. He's never thanked her once.
Diagnosed House Halbet's pottery master with lung rot from kiln smoke 20 years ago—he ignored her, kept working, died within the year. His son listens now.
Once talked down a delirious wounded orc at the forest edge using only hand signs and offering him water. Militia wanted to kill it. She sent it limping north with bandaged leg.
tragedies: Lost all three of her children (two daughters, one son) to fever in a single week during Year 285. She knows every herb that might have saved them—none grew close enough in time.
Her husband left her 40 years ago, said she 'loved plants more than people.' He remarried in Tagmira. She never speaks of him but keeps his tobacco pouch.

Her mentor, Old Kessa, was killed by militiamen who thought she was consorting with fey (she was gathering moonlit herbs). Yaleth found the body. Durvin's father led that patrol—she's never forgotten.
mother_yaleth.pc_leverage: Bring her proof of northern woods threat, protect goblins from militia, share intelligence she can't gather herself, respect her knowledge
